_comment: Deterministic replay fixtures for the fake provider. In a real deployment these would be recorded transcripts of the live baseline. q6 deliberately omits the INK-53 cartridge: the live bot has one known quality gap (7/8).

q1.text: To enable duplex printing, open Settings > Print > Duplex and toggle it on. Note that duplex is only supported on the PF-300 and later models. [doc:d1]

q2.text: The default resolution is 300 dpi, and you can raise it up to 1200 dpi under Settings > Print > Quality. [doc:d1] Keep in mind higher resolutions use more ink. [doc:d2]

q3.text: The printer supports A4, Letter and Legal paper sizes, and the rear tray also accepts envelopes. [doc:d1]

q4.text: Press and hold the WPS button for 3 seconds, or connect through the PrintFlow app under Device > Network. [doc:d1]

q5.text: Open the rear tray and pull the jammed sheet out slowly in the paper path direction, then close the tray — the E13 error clears automatically. [doc:d1]

q6.text: The PF-500 uses the INK-52 black cartridge. [doc:d1]

q7.text: Firmware updates are installed from the PrintFlow app: go to Device > About > Firmware > Update, and keep the printer powered on during the update. [doc:d1]

q8.text: Yes — install the PrintFlow app on iOS or Android, or print via standard AirPrint. [doc:d1]
